reason: This lead is not currently in redesign mode.

previewability.reason: The lead is reachable and has enough context for a starter preview.

productionReadiness.reason: The packet has enough verified facts and structured content for Open Design.

redesignValue: Show service coverage, fast response, and quote intent more clearly.
Turn phone or quote actions into the dominant path on mobile.

outreachAngle.hook: Noticed there is no dedicated website experience for your roofing and restoration in Jamison Town / Greater Western Sydney, so I mocked up what a clearer first impression could look like.
outreachAngle.observation: Discord image OCR showed a roofing/restoration sign with phone 0424 371 622 and free in-person quote offer.
outreachAngle.diagnosis: M&B Roofing appears to have no meaningful website presence, which means search and referral traffic has nowhere strong to land. A simple, credible roofing and restoration site would likely improve trust and enquiry conversion.
